rationale: The cited paper is a 2003 JMR econometric advertising model that explicitly includes exogeneity diagnostics, model selection, and holdout forecasting, which closely matches the citing paper’s focus on econometric adequacy for policy simulation. Since the citing article also conducts a structured review of 1998–2003 JMR studies, this cited article is likely part of the substantive evidence base rather than a clearly incidental background mention.
